    • See full role descriptionAnalog Layout Lead
    • Role Number: 200573956
    • Weekly Hours: 40 Hours

    Apple Silicon Engineering Group (SEG) is seeking Analog Layout Leads to work on the next generation of Apple's systems-on-chip (SOCs)! These SOCs, with multi-billion transistors, serve as the core of iPhones and iPads. We focus on Analog/Mixed-Signal (AMS) circuits, including SerDes for data communication, PLLs for clock generation, and sensors for measuring all sorts of physical quantities.Analog Layout Engineers are essential in transforming design ideas into silicon, collaborating with circuit designers, and using sophisticated tools and methodologies.
